sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Current agent position
lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("Agent area:")
for i in range(18, 24):
    print(f"  row {i}: {lines[i][:50]}")

# Pattern is at rows 20-21, cols 5-40
# Red block is at rows 19-22, cols 41-44
# Need to extend pattern by 1 more col to touch red block

# Try RIGHT to extend pattern
result = action(['RIGHT'])
print(f"\nAfter RIGHT: board_changed={last_action_result.get('board_changed')}")

lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("Row 20 after RIGHT:")
print(f"  {lines[20][:50]}")

# Check if pattern now touches red block
row20 = lines[20]
print(f"Col 40: '{row20[40]}', Col 41: '{row20[41]}', Col 42: '{row20[42]}'")

# Try ACTION7
result = action(['ACTION7'])
print(f"\nACTION7: board_changed={last_action_result.get('board_changed')}, level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

if last_action_result.get('level_completed'):
    print("LEVEL COMPLETED!")
else:
    # Check what changed
    lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
    print("Row 20 after ACTION7:")
    print(f"  {lines[20][:50]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
